provenance.row_order_signature_algorithm: sha256(concatenated pandas-hash-pandas-object uint64 blocks over ordered restricted row keys, index included)
provenance.derivation: raw traffic predictors selected directly from trafik.csv; corrected target reconstructed from raw threat.csv; no legacy processed target used

split.group_definition: hash(Serial, Virtual System, Session ID, Start Time); zero IDs row-unique
split.tie_policy: all groups whose earliest time equals the cutoff are assigned to test
split.purge_policy: pre-cutoff groups whose latest row reaches or crosses cutoff are excluded from training

uncertainty.method: paired nonoverlapping-block bootstrap over 20 contiguous session-group blocks on fixed seed-42 test scores
uncertainty.scope: evaluation-sampling uncertainty; not full training-population uncertainty

limitations: One organization, one firewall, and one approximately 47-minute traffic window.
The target is retrospective same-session threat-log linkage, not future maliciousness prediction.
The nonoverlapping-block bootstrap conditions on fixed seed-42 scores and does not represent full population or refit uncertainty.
Exposure-only and rate-normalized models diagnose observation-opportunity dependence; they do not identify a causal mechanism.

included: aggregate linkage and fail-closed completeness counts
strict temporal split invariants without absolute timestamps
seeds, feature boundaries, dependency versions, and runtime
excluded: row-level labels, predictions, or group hashes
sensitive device, interface, zone, country, or rule values
public_release_boundary.authorized_aggregate_scope: Anonymized application, category, and policy-pocket summaries may be published under institutional permission; no row-level mapping is included in this package.
